_comment: Maps Supabase 'applicants' columns (left) to PDF AcroForm field names (right). Adjust right-hand values to match your actual template - inspect real field names with pypdf's reader.get_fields(). Boolean columns (minor, main_contact) currently render as Python's str(True)/str(False) via tools/pdf_filler.py - revisit if your form expects Yes/No or a checkbox value instead.
